mapper.select: SELECT id, contract_id, plan_no, plan_type, plan_amount, plan_date, condition_desc, actual_date, actual_amount, voucher_no, pay_method, remark, recorded_by, recorded_time, status, created_time FROM contract_payment_plan WHERE contract_id = #{contractId} ORDER BY plan_date ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, contract_id, plan_no, plan_type, plan_amount, plan_date, condition_desc, actual_date, actual_amount, voucher_no, pay_method, remark, recorded_by, recorded_time, status, created_time FROM contract_payment_plan WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO contract_payment_plan ( contract_id, plan_no, plan_type, plan_amount, plan_date, condition_desc, actual_date, actual_amount, voucher_no, pay_method, remark, recorded_by, recorded_time, status ) VALUES
( #{p.contractId}, #{p.planNo}, #{p.planType}, #{p.planAmount}, #{p.planDate}, #{p.conditionDesc}, #{p.actualDate}, #{p.actualAmount}, #{p.voucherNo}, #{p.payMethod}, #{p.remark}, #{p.recordedBy}, #{p.recordedTime}, #{p.status} )
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(actual_amount), 0) FROM contract_payment_plan WHERE contract_id = #{contractId} AND actual_amount IS NOT NULL AND status = 20
mapper.update: UPDATE contract_payment_plan SET status = 30 WHERE status = 10 AND plan_date < #{date}
mapper.select: SELECT id, contract_id, plan_no, plan_type, plan_amount, plan_date, condition_desc, actual_date, actual_amount, voucher_no, pay_method, remark, recorded_by, recorded_time, status, created_time FROM contract_payment_plan WHERE status = #{status} AND plan_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY plan_date ASC

SELECT pp.id, pp.contract_id, pp.plan_no, pp.plan_type, pp.plan_amount, pp.plan_date, pp.condition_desc, pp.actual_date, pp.actual_amount, pp.voucher_no, pp.pay_method, pp.remark, pp.recorded_by, pp.recorded_time, pp.status, pp.created_time FROM contract_payment_plan pp INNER JOIN contract_main cm ON cm.id = pp.contract_id WHERE cm.deleted = 0 AND pp.status = #{status} AND cm.dept_id = #{deptId} AND pp.plan_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY pp.plan_date ASC
